name: Lenny's Product Management Skills
description: 86 product management skills from Lenny's Podcast for Claude Code agents. Features frameworks from industry leaders including Shreyas Doshi, Marty Cagan, Elena Verna, and other product experts.
review: Comprehensive collection of 86 well-structured product management skills from Lenny's Podcast. The skills distill expert knowledge from industry leaders into actionable frameworks for AI agents. Exceptionally well-documented with clear installation and usage instructions. Pure markdown format ensures complete security and broad compatibility.
